title: ipomoea batatas var. leucantha
intro: Ipomoea batatas var. leucantha, also known as white sweet potato, is a variety of the sweet potato plant with white or pale yellow skin and white or pale yellow flesh. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ipomoea batatas var. leucantha include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and can be consumed as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
